prestazioni: AWE Track Edition Turbo-Back Exhaust System (CNC-mandrel bent 3.5" T304 stainless steel, resonated center section, quad 4.5" rolled tips) for the EA837 3.0T (CGWB) engine, optimized for 400-450whp with minimal backpressure and aggressive 3"-4" diameter mid-pipe scavenging

034 Motorsport Stage 2 High-Flow Intake (carbon fiber heat shield, dual-layer oiled cotton gauze filter, laser-etched MAF housing) paired with a custom 034 Motorsport Hybrid Intercooler Upgrade (5.5" thick bar-and-plate core, 60% larger than OEM, 6061-T6 aluminum end tanks with CNC-machined flow paths) to reduce intake temps by 30°C under 20psi boost on the CGWB’s stock BorgWarner K04-034 turbo

APR Stage 3+ Hybrid Turbo System (Garrett GTX3076R Gen II .82 A/R, billet compressor wheel, 62mm OD compressor, 64mm turbine wheel, 3" V-band downpipe, custom APR wastegate actuator) with APR’s proprietary ECU calibration (93 octane: 520whp/500wtq, 100 octane: 580whp/540wtq) and supporting fuel system (APR High-Pressure Fuel Pump, APR Fuel Injector Upgrade: 1,000cc/min Bosch Motorsport injectors)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit (Pandem Design) for B9 A5 Coupe (front fenders: +35mm, rear fenders: +50mm, carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts with integrated LED turn signals), paired with custom 3M Matte Military Green (212) wrap with satin clear coat

OEM+ Audi Sport Carbon Fiber Optic Package (carbon fiber mirror caps, side blade trim, rear diffuser insert) combined with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber rear spoiler (inspired by the RS5 DTM, 120mm height, adjustable angle via billet aluminum mounts) and a full Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20x9.5 ET35 (front) / 20x11 ET40 (rear) forged wheel set in Gloss Black with brushed lip, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear)

Interior: Recaro Pole Position SPG XL (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather mix, FIA-approved 6-point harness cutouts) with custom door cards (Alcantara-wrapped, carbon fiber trim, illuminated APR logo in door pulls), full roll cage (Custom Cages UK, T45 steel, 8-point bolt-in with harness bar, powder-coated Satin Black), and a Motec C127 digital dash (replaces OEM cluster, configurable shift lights, boost/vacuum, oil temp/pressure, and wideband AFR logging)
